description_long: This object is a set of four dark green ceramic cups with matching saucers, all adorned with yellow floral patterns, arranged on a metallic wire rack. The cups are suspended by their handles from the upper part of the rack, while the saucers are neatly stacked at the base. The rack is constructed from shiny, silver-colored metal rods, forming a stable frame with a circular base and vertical supports. One cup and saucer are placed separately in front of the rack, highlighting the set's design and usability. The floral motifs are prominent and add a decorative touch to the otherwise minimalist and functional arrangement. The overall appearance is elegant and suitable for both domestic and urban café settings.
description: A decorative set of four dark green cups with yellow floral patterns and matching saucers, organized on a silver metal rack. One cup and saucer are displayed separately in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four cups hanging on the rack, with one cup and saucer placed in front, clearly displaying the floral pattern.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the arrangement of cups and saucers on the rack, with the separate cup and saucer to the left.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the backs of the cups and the stacked saucers beneath, with all cups hanging on the rack.
description_view_3: Back view showing the handles of the cups and the stacked saucers, with the separate cup and saucer now on the right.
